title: inula eliasii
intro: Inula eliasii, also known as Elias's elecampane or Inula eliasii, is a plant species in the daisy family native to South Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. Inula eliasii has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Inula eliasii include infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
